channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Urgent safety concern: recurring pothole near primary school, degraded surface and poor historic repairs, 1st May
item.description:
I am writing to formally complain about a recurring and increasingly hazardous pothole on this busy road and popular cycling route, located just south of a primary school. This defect presents a daily safety risk to cyclists, motorists and other road users, particularly during peak school drop‑off and pick‑up times. As shown in the attached photographs, the pothole has significantly deteriorated and the top layer of the road surface has now failed entirely, leaving a pronounced depression. The area has clearly been patched on multiple occasions—at least half a dozen times—but these repairs have been inadequate and short‑lived. Each time, the defect reappears, continues to grow and becomes more dangerous. When surrounding potholes were recently repaired, this area should have been properly addressed at the same time. Instead, the continued piecemeal approach has failed, allowing further deterioration of the carriageway. Given that this is a well‑used cycling route, the uneven and broken road surface is particularly hazardous, forcing cyclists to swerve or ride through the defect and significantly increasing the risk of loss of control or collision. The proximity to a primary school makes this issue especially concerning, as the volume and mix of road users at this location elevates the risk of an accident occurring on a daily basis.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gretton Road, Gretton, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Speed limit signs missing, 1st May
item.description:
Speed Limit signs 40/National Speed limit is missing, also sign obscured by branches/vegetation, worn/no road markings
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ashchurch Rural, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is missing (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 1st May
item.description:
FW: Abrupt Level Difference 450mmx400mmx24mm TM: Give and Take 2 x NSDs Next to ATC Flooring (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is a sunken drain cover on the A46 towards Gloucester between Nuthill and Green Street, 1st May
item.description:
Dear Sir The problem is worse than it looks in the photograph as the manhole has sunk further into the road surface. The road is quite dark at this point and you can't see the manhole cover to steer clear of it. My car makes a loud jolt from both wheels when I drive over it. My concern is for cyclists/motorbikes who may fall off as a result. Thank you Yours faithfully

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Painswick Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic Light Head Rotated, 1st May
item.description:
The traffic light which should be facing towards town/Portland St south has rotated and so is not visible to oncoming traffic, i.e. traffic coming past the Cotswold heading North. This is the light by the Millenium building facing towards the Cotswold.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fairview Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Traffic light head is facing wrong direction

item.title: FixMyStreet ref: 9367020, 1st May
item.description:
I didn’t include my details for the above issue and have therefore not received details on how you are addressing this. Would you be able to let me know please.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parabola Road, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 1st May
item.description:

item.title: Green light not working, 1st May
item.description:
New Barn lane crossing by the Prestbury library
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 209, New Barn Lane, Lynworth, Cheltenham

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 1st May
item.description:
15db Abrupt level difference CW 300x300x40mm Road closure with 15db (CW6 Abrupt Level Differences )
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is a leak in the ditch in the grass verge I have spoken to seven Trent and they have been out and tested the water for chlorine and have told me to contact u as it must be a drain problem as it is not fowl or clean water we have emptied the ditch and it just keeps refilling, 1st May
item.description:
The problem is in the grass verge outside willow house meadow view Wainlode land Norton Gloucester GL2 9 RH, this overage will be having gigaclear conditions for 2 elderly people in the next couple of weeks and the water in the ditch is going to affect the installation please can u get someone out to inspect this issue as Severn Trent have said it is a council issue.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Road, Norton, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: No rain in 24 hours - water has increased or remained the same

item.title: Pothole near traffic island, 1st May
item.description:
Pothole by traffic island on westbound carriageway. Ongoing erosion of previous repair causing “bouncing” of nearby houses when buses ( 97 & 98 bus route ) & Lorries pass over it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cold Pool Lane, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
